channel.title: Antonio P. Sberna — Research Fellow in Structural Engineering on Antonio P. Sberna
channel.description: Recent content in Antonio P. Sberna — Research Fellow in Structural Engineering on Antonio P. Sberna

item.title: Genetic algorithm framework for environmentally sustainable and cost-efficient seismic retrofitting design of reinforced concrete structures
Analytical formulation for biaxial curvature domains of rectangular reinforced concrete sections
Seismic risk reduction of masonry barrel vaults using CRM: fragility assessment using a fiber-section approach
Engineered Design Frameworks for Seismic Retrofitting: A State-of-the-Art Review
item.description: Engineered design frameworks for seismic retrofitting: state-of-the-art methodologies, emerging trends, and future research directions.

item.title: Reliability-based seismic retrofitting design methodology for non-ductile reinforced concrete frame structures
item.description: Performance-based seismic design framework of retrofitting systems for existing structures.

item.title: Local shear demand correction model for the analysis of reinforced concrete infilled frames with equivalent struts
item.description: Proposing an analytical model that accurately predicts additional shear demand due to frame-infill interaction under seismic loads.

item.title: Enhanced Compressive Performance and Energy Absorption in SLM-Fabricated 316L Arrowhead Auxetics via Tendon and Stuffer Geometry Modification
item.description: Geometric optimization of 3D-printed auxetic arrowhead structures for superior mechanical performance.

item.title: Characterizing bamboo aggregate foamed concrete for sustainable construction: thermal, acoustic, mechanical, and environmental aspects
item.description: Sustainable bamboo foamed concrete for structural applications; mechanical, thermal, acoustic, and environmental analyses.

item.title: Enhancing seismic site response analyses: tuning soil properties via genetic algorithms and Bayesian model updating from downhole array data
item.description: Combined Genetic Algorithm and Bayesian model updating of soil properties to enhance seismic response predictions.

item.title: Structural health monitoring of masonry structure by stress sensors: Experimental induced damage tests and proposed numerical approach for real time monitoring
item.description: Investigates innovative stress sensors for Structural Health Monitoring in masonry structures.

item.title: Numerical Modeling of Dapped-End Beams Subjected to Corrosion and Retrofitting Interventions
Seismic Response of Masonry Aggregate Buildings by Explicit Modelling Different Interconnection Degrees
Cost-effective topology optimization of existing masonry structure seismic reinforcements by a new genetic algorithm-based framework
item.description: New framework for the cost optimization of CRM retrofitting in masonry structures involving linear elastic analyses.

item.title: Dynamic progressive collapse response of multi-storey frame structures with masonry infills
item.description: An analysis of the effect of masonry infills on progressive collapse of RC frame structures.

item.title: A new GA-based framework based on Expected Annual Loss for optimizing seismic retrofitting in reinforced concrete frame structures
A novel genetic algorithm-based optimization framework for minimizing seismic retrofitting costs in existing masonry structures
Genetic algorithm-based seismic retrofitting optimization for existing masonry structures
Predictive equations for the out-of-plane resistance of masonry infills in RC frames by a data-driven approach
Genetic algorithm-based optimization procedure for the seismic retrofitting of existing masonry structures
AI-based optimization framework for the design of seismic retrofitting of reinforced concrete frame structures based on direct costs and EAL
item.description: New advancement on the computer-aided design of seismic retrofitting intervention based on the evaluation of EAL.

item.title: A new empirical formulation for the out-of-plane resistance of infilled reinforced concrete frames without prior in-plane loading
item.description: Genetic algorithm application to determine an empirical formulation for OOP strength of infills from experimental and numerical results.

item.title: Simplified Evaluation of the Additional Shear Demand Due to Masonry Infills
A novel framework based on Expected Annual Loss for optimizing seismic retrofitting in reinforced concrete structures
Dynamic response of infilled frames subject to accidental column losses
Expected Annual Loss oriented seismic retrofitting optimization of RC frame structures using a new AI-based framework
Optimization of steel-jacketing retrofitting of shear-critical and ductility-critical RC frame structures by a novel genetic algorithm framework
A new genetic algorithm-based framework for optimized design of steel-jacketing retrofitting in shear-critical and ductility-critical RC frame structures
item.description: A new framework to optimize retrofitting interventions for RC structures with shear and ductility lacks.

item.title: Cost and EAL based optimization for seismic reinforcement of RC structures
Cost-based and EAL based optimization algorithms for seismic retrofitting of RC frame structures
Genetic algorithm-based optimization of RC frame structures retrofitting with steel jacketing
Optimal seismic retrofitting of reinforced concrete buildings by steel-jacketing using a genetic algorithm-based framework
item.description: The first application of genetic algorithms to pinpoint the optimal arrangement of steel jacketing retrofitting interventions on RC columns.

item.title: Nonlinear Analysis of Masonry Structures
item.description:
Course description

The course introduces the nonlinear behaviour and numerical modelling of masonry structures, from material heterogeneity and failure mechanisms to constitutive properties and modelling strategies. It covers micro-, macro-, equivalent-frame, and discrete approaches, with a final focus on masonry infills and their interaction with reinforced concrete frames.
